tasks.description: Array of task objects to display on the chart

columns.description: Column definitions for the left fields panel

viewMode.description: Controls how the timeline is rendered and grouped

startDate.description: Override the auto-computed start date of the visible range

endDate.description: Override the auto-computed end date of the visible range

height.description: Total height of the Gantt chart container

rowHeight.description: Height of each task row in pixels

columnWidth.description: Width of each timeline column. Defaults vary by view mode

fieldsPanelWidth.description: Width of the left-side fields/columns panel

showFieldsPanel.description: Toggle the left fields panel visibility

showToday.description: Highlight today with a vertical line and scroll to it on mount

showDependencies.description: Render SVG dependency arrows between tasks

showProgress.description: Render the progress overlay on task bars

showTooltip.description: Show hover tooltip with task details

isHoliday.description: Callback to determine if a date should be marked as a holiday

allowTaskDrag.description: Allow users to drag tasks to new dates

allowTaskResize.description: Allow users to resize task bars from either end

allowTaskCreate.description: Allow users to drag on empty rows to create new tasks

readOnly.description: Disable all drag, resize, and create interactions

taskBarTemplate.description: Custom render function for task bar content

tooltipTemplate.description: Custom render function for the hover tooltip

onTaskChange.description: Fires when a task is moved or resized

onTaskClick.description: Fires when a task bar is clicked

onTaskDoubleClick.description: Fires when a task bar is double-clicked

onTaskCreate.description: Fires when a new task range is drawn (requires allowTaskCreate)

onViewModeChange.description: Fires when the user switches the view mode

onExpandToggle.description: Fires when a group task is expanded or collapsed

color.description: Custom background color for the task bar

textColor.description: Custom text color inside the task bar

dependencies.description: Array of dependency connections to other tasks

children.description: Nested child tasks (makes this task a group/parent)

collapsed.description: Whether this group is initially collapsed

assignee.description: Assignee name shown in tooltip and custom columns

draggable.description: Override draggability for this specific task

resizable.description: Override resizability for this specific task

tooltip.description: Custom tooltip content for this task

data.description: Arbitrary extra data accessible in templates
